title: Masayuki
wikitext:
[[File:Masayuki.png|thumb|Masayuki|200px]]

'''Masayuki''' (摩砂雪) was an episode director for Evangelion as well as being credited with storyboard work and the animation of the series ending sequence. Aside from Evangelion, Masayuki was the character designer for the ''Macross Plus'' series, and has worked on several other [[Gainax]] works such as ''FLCL'', ''Diebuster'' (Aim for the Top 2), and ''Tengen Toppa Gurren-Lagann''. He will be helping with directing the first of the 4 [[Rebuild of Evangelion]] movies.
Masayuki also produced the 'Full-Length Opening' and 'Full-Length Ending' AMVs for the ''01 Test Type DVD'', and the AMVs on ''NGE MUSIC & REMIX DVD'', which include<ref>[http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=67218 Forum Thread: Masayuki's Music Videos]</ref> <ref>[http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=410331  Discussion on Opening and Ending videos by Masayuki]</ref>

* [[ASUKA]]: [[Soul's Refrain|Tamashii no Refrain]] (Soul Refrain)
* [[REI]]: [[Tengoku no Kioku]] (Memories of Paradise)
* [[MISATO]]: [[Thanatos -If I can't be yours-]]


The 'Full-Length Opening' includes new art & telops (see the [http://evacommentary.org/full-op/full-op.html Evacommentary page]).

[[Kazuya Tsurumaki]] has described Masayuki's editing technique as "transcendental"<ref>[http://forum.evageeks.org/post/408691/Evangelion-20-CRC-Tsurumaki-Interview/ Evangelion 2.0 CRC Interview Translation]</ref>

html:
Masayuki (摩砂雪) was an episode director for Evangelion as well as being credited with storyboard work and the animation of the series ending sequence. Aside from Evangelion, Masayuki was the character designer for the Macross Plus series, and has worked on several other Gainax works such as FLCL, Diebuster (Aim for the Top 2), and Tengen Toppa Gurren-Lagann. He will be helping with directing the first of the 4 Rebuild of Evangelion movies. Masayuki also produced the 'Full-Length Opening' and 'Full-Length Ending' AMVs for the 01 Test Type DVD, and the AMVs on NGE MUSIC & REMIX DVD, which include[1] [2]

  • ASUKA: Tamashii no Refrain (Soul Refrain)
  • REI: Tengoku no Kioku (Memories of Paradise)
  • MISATO: Thanatos -If I can't be yours-


The 'Full-Length Opening' includes new art & telops (see the Evacommentary page).

Kazuya Tsurumaki has described Masayuki's editing technique as "transcendental"[3]
